---
date: "2020-08-31T00:00:00Z"
external_link: ""
links:
- icon: github
  icon_pack: fab
  name: GitHub
  url: https://github.com/discindo/gghisse/
slides: 
summary:  R package with helper functions for summarising and visualizing HiSSE objects .
tags:
- R
title: gghisse
authors: ['teo']
url_code: ""
url_pdf: ""
url_slides: ""
url_video: ""
---
 R package with helper functions for summarising and visualizing HiSSE objects
